vlogs.title: Open Source Friday: Caracal
vlogs.description: A live walkthrough of Caracal on GitHub's Open Source Friday: why agents need an authority plane, how mandates and policy work, and how to get involved as a contributor.

vlogs.title: Getting Started with Caracal in 5 Minutes
vlogs.description: Learn the basics of Caracal: how to run the STS and Gateway local stack, define your first Rego policy, and secure an HTTP API route.

vlogs.title: How to Protect FastMCP and Express Applications
vlogs.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of integrating the Caracal Express and FastMCP connectors to intercept agent requests and validate mandates.

vlogs.title: Caracal at Lynx Capital: Secure Agentic Investing
vlogs.description: A deep-dive demo showcasing Caracal's agent delegation and policy enforcement within Lynx Capital's automated trading system.

vlogs.title: The Future of AI Identity and Immutable Audit Trails
vlogs.description: Keynote speech from Garudex Labs on establishing secure identity boundaries for multi-agent systems and cryptographically verified tool execution.
